items.description: Source array. Only the rows in the visible window are rendered.

itemHeight.description: Row height. Pass a number for uniform rows or a function for per-row heights. When omitted, estimatedItemHeight is used.

keyExtractor.description: Optional key extractor for stable row identity.

overscan.description: Number of rows to render before/after the visible window.

height.description: CSS height of the scrollable container.

estimatedItemHeight.description: Fallback row height when itemHeight is not provided.

variant.description: Visual style. 'divided' draws a separator between rows; 'card' renders each row in a card with margin.

emptyState.description: Optional content rendered when items is empty.

onEndReached.description: Fired when the scroll position is within endReachedThreshold of the bottom. Pairs with infinite loading.

endReachedThreshold.description: Pixels from the bottom at which onEndReached should fire.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the scroller.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the list landmark.
